Vaccine Temperature Monitoring 
Temperature Monitoring Best Practices 
These fact sheets illustrate best practices for refrigerated and frozen vaccines. Written in plain language, they include assessments to reinforce key points. While they are CDC-developed and branded fact sheets, each contains an area where you can insert your agency's logo.
Refrigerated Vaccines Temperature Monitoring (Feb 2018)
Fahrenheit (F) | Celsius (C) 
Frozen Vaccines Temperature Monitoring (Feb 2018)

Temperature Logs for COVID-19 Vaccines 
When storing COVID-19 vaccines in your practice, you can use the logs below to track, check, and record daily temperatures.

Temperature Excursions 
This guidance document describes immediate corrective actions following a temperature excursion in your vaccine storage unit.
Handling a Temperature Excursion in Your Vaccine Storage Unit
